creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
This mail is sent to:

- GNATS database
- ports/www/thttpd maintainer, anders@fix.no
- Committer who close the PR ports/19656, steve@freebsd.org
- MAINTAINER of src/lib/libfetch, des@freebsd.org

***

Although this PR is closed, but not all the changes of initial email
is included to current ports.

@@ -54,7 +56,7 @@
 	@if [ ! -f ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/thttpd.sh ]; then \
 		${ECHO} "Installing ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/thttpd.sh startup file."; \
 		${ECHO} "#!/bin/sh" > ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/thttpd.sh; \
-		${ECHO} "[ -x ${PREFIX}/sbin/thttpd_wrapper ] && ${PREFIX}/sbin/thttpd_wrapper && ${ECHO} -n ' thttpd'" >> ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/thttpd.sh; \
+		${ECHO} "[ -x ${PREFIX}/sbin/thttpd_wrapper ] && ${PREFIX}/sbin/thttpd_wrapper & && ${ECHO} -n ' thttpd'" >> ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/thttpd.sh; \
 		${CHMOD} 751 ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/thttpd.sh; \
 	fi

In this PR, startup script is changed. However, files/thttpd.sh (which
is created before this commit, to support 'start and stop' argument)
does not changed at all.

If you install thttpd-2.19 via ports and reboot system, boot sequence
will stop to kick thttpd ('cause thttpd_wrapper doesn't go background).
Would you please merge this change to the current repository, committers?

And moreover, the MD5 value of thttpd-2.19.tar.gz is changed. I dunno
why, but it is the fact that the tgzball is *changed*. The new MD5
value is 69a8cf991cf67b03d82971151d4ba50f. Please check and update
files/md5.

***

P.S: especially for the maintainer of libfetch

fetch(1) bundled with FreeBSD-current as of July/11/2000 (yes, today)
is somewhat broken. It cannot fetch the *original* tgzball of thttpd,
http://www.acme.com/software/thttpd/thttpd-2.19.tar.gz. Here is a
sample session:

% fetch -A http://www.acme.com/software/thttpd/thttpd-2.19.tar.gz
fetch: thttpd-2.19.tar.gz: size not known
fetch: Not Found
% 

But, this file EXISTS.

% telnet -4 www.acme.com 80
Trying 209.133.38.22...
Connected to bomb.acme.COM.
Escape character is '^]'.
HEAD /software/thttpd/thttpd-2.19.tar.gz HTTP/1.0

HTTP/1.0 200 OK
Server: thttpd/2.19 23jun00
Content-type: application/x-tar
Date: Tue, 11 Jul 2000 14:17:56 GMT
Last-modified: Tue, 04 Jul 2000 16:24:15 GMT
Accept-Ranges: bytes
Connection: close
Content-encoding: x-gzip
Content-length: 121406

Connection closed by foreign host.
%

-- -
Makoto `MAR' MATSUSHITA
